---
title: "Kyle Tolliver"
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
pacman::p_load(pacman, tidyverse, knitr)
```

<script type="text/javascript">
 function showhide(id) {
    var e = document.getElementById(id);
    e.style.display = (e.style.display == 'block') ? 'none' : 'block';
 }
</script>

<style>

</style>

![](./site_libs/images/me.jpg)

## About Me

BYU-Idaho graduate with a Bachelor's (BS) in Software Engineering. I also earned a minor in Computer Engineering and Data Science. I love to learn new things and solve problems. 

<div style="padding-left:5px;">

<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('hovertobegin')">A little more about me</a></span>
<div id="hovertobegin" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

#### Quick Facts

* Member of Tau Beta Pi - Idaho Delta Chapter
* Inquisitive, Motivated and Driven

#### Top Skills

* R/Rmd
* Python
* C/C++
* Embedded C
* Verilog
* HTML
* CSS
* Github

</div></div>

<br />

## Contact Me

* Email: [kyle@tollivers.org](mailto:kyle@tollivers.org?subject=Portfolio)
* Phone: [(805) 367-6723](tel:18053676723)
* LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/kctolli](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kctolli)
* Github: [github.com/kctolli](https://github.com/kctolli)

<!-- <br />  -->

<hr />

## Highlights

* [COVID-19 Research and Consulting](https://kctolli.github.io/COVID-19/index.html)
* [Senior Design Project](https://ecen499-nasa.github.io/)
* [Data Science Coursework](./Data-Science/index.html)
* [Web Design and Development](./WDD/WDD100/index.html)
* [Digital System Design Coursework](https://ecen-340.glitch.me/)

<!-- <br />  -->

<hr />

###### *--- [Licensed](https://github.com/kctolli/kctolli.github.io/blob/master/LICENSE) under [GNU General Public License v3.0](./site_libs/LICENSE.txt)*

######  *--- Website is made using [Rstudio](https://rstudio.com/) with [Rmd](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/index.html) and [Yaml](https://github.com/kctolli/kctolli.github.io/blob/master/_site.yml) files *

######  *--- Hosted on [github](https://github.com/kctolli/kctolli.github.io)*
